zh.name: 张宁波
zh.title: 高级软件工程师
zh.summary: 我是一位经验丰富的网络工程师，拥有18年的IT行业经验。我专注于大中型项目的全栈开发，利用Java及其核心框架（如Spring Boot和Spring Cloud）构建可扩展且健壮的后端应用程序。
zh.summary_text: 在电子商务、流通、保险、金融等高流量且业务复杂度高的行业，拥有18年以上业务系统开发经验。从需求定义、基础设计等上游工程到实现、各种测试、生产发布、运维，系统生命周期全程负责。
zh.s1_desc: 以Java为中心的业务系统开发（18年以上）
zh.s2_desc: 从需求定义到设计、开发、测试、运维
zh.s3_desc: 大规模长期项目的经验
zh.s4_desc: 与15个以上国家的多国籍团队协作经验
zh.school: 日本大学 研究生院 生产工学研究课 电气电子工学
zh.p1_overview: 现有Scratch系统构建的销售管理、生产管理、库存管理供应链管理系统更换。
zh.p1_d1: MDM团队，负责业务伙伴、产品编号、价格信息等主数据管理
zh.p1_d2: 调查并整理现有系统设计文档及相关资料
zh.p1_d3: 在规格信息不足的情况下分析业务和数据结构
zh.p1_d4: 讨论更换设计方针并提供技术支持
zh.p2_overview: BtoB EC服务的后端系统开发。
zh.p2_d2: 购物车功能的设计与实现
zh.p3_overview: Bus / Rent Car / Car Share 服务的长期大规模系统开发。
zh.p3_d1: 功能追加、规格变更对应的设计与实现
zh.p3_d2: 生产障害的调查、修正及发布对应
zh.p3_d4: 从单元测试到性能测试到外部联动测试的一贯对应
zh.p3_d5: 大规模迁移: Java 1.7→1.8, Struts→Spring MVC, Oracle 9i→10g
zh.p4_overview: 与中国大型EC企业的协业系统开发。
zh.p4_d1: 日本市场订单数据同步功能
zh.p5_overview: 乐天台湾市场的系统维护开发。
zh.p5_d1: 联盟管理（商品、库存、积分、优惠券）
zh.p5_d2: 最终用户订单、支付、履历管理
zh.p6_overview: 面向三井不动产的管理系统开发。
zh.p6_d1: 合同信息、建筑设施信息管理功能的设计实现
zh.p7_overview: 使用Android加FeliCa(NFC)的大学出勤管理系统。
zh.p8_title: 中小企业事务管理系统
zh.p8_overview: 勤务 有薪假申请 研修预约系统的开发。
zh.p8_d1: 勤务管理有薪假申请研修预约功能开发
zh.p9_title: 大型证券公司业务系统维护
zh.p9_overview: 大型证券公司业务系统的维护。
zh.p10_title: 大型保险流通业基干系统
zh.p10_overview: 大型保险业流通业面向的基干系统的开发维护。
zh.p10_d1: 法律修订对应新服务对应
zh.pr1: 兼具开发与运维经验，能够以系统不因完工而结束为前提进行设计与实现
zh.pr2: 新技术业务知识的吸收能力
zh.pr3: 与15个以上国家的多国籍团队协作经验
zh.pr4: 大规模长期系统的稳定运用改善实绩
zh.skill_lang: Java (10年以上), JavaScript, Python, PHP, C#, COBOL, VBA, HTML, CSS, JSP, PL/SQL, Shell
zh.skill_os: MacOS, Linux (CentOS, Rocky Linux), Windows, MSP-OSIV
zh.skill_db: Oracle, MySQL, MongoDB, SQL Server, NDB, Sybase
zh.skill_fw: Spring Boot, Spring MVC/Batch/Cloud, Struts, Raku Framework
zh.skill_cloud: AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB), Oracle Cloud, Alibaba Cloud
zh.skill_tools: Jenkins, Zabbix, JIRA, Git, GitHub, Maven, Gradle

ja.title: シニアソフトウェアエンジニア
ja.summary: 18年以上わたり業務系システム開発に従事。要件定義・基本設計などの上流工程から実装・各種テスト・本番リリース・運用保守まで、システムライフサイクル全体を一貫して担当。
ja.summary_text: EC・流通・保険・金融といった高トラフィックかつ業務複雑度の高い業界において、18年以上にわたり業務系システム開発に従事。要件定義・基本設計などの上流工程から実装・各種テスト・本番リリース・運用保守まで、システムライフサイクル全体を一貫して担当。

ja.s2_desc: 要件定義から設計・開発・テスト・運用まで
ja.s3_desc: 大規模・長期プロジェクトの経験
ja.s4_desc: 15力国以上の多国籍チームでの協業経験

en.name: Zhang Ningbo
en.title: Senior Software Engineer
en.summary: I am a seasoned web engineer with 18 years of experience in the IT industry. Specializing in full-stack development for large and medium-sized projects, I leverage Java and its core frameworks like Spring Boot and Spring Cloud to build scalable and robust backend applications.
en.summary_text: Over 18 years of experience in business system development across high-traffic industries with complex business requirements, including e-commerce, distribution, insurance, and finance. Consistently responsible for the entire system lifecycle from upstream processes such as requirements definition and basic design to implementation, various testing, production releases, and operational maintenance.
en.s1_desc: Business system development centered on Java (10+ years)
en.s2_desc: From requirements definition to design, development, testing, and operations
en.s4_desc: Collaboration experience with multinational teams from 15+ countries
en.school: Nihon University, Graduate School of Production Engineering
en.p1_overview: Replacement of a sales management, production management, and inventory management supply chain management system built with the existing scratch system 'spirits'.
en.p1_d1: Assigned to the MDM team, responsible for master data management areas such as business partners, product numbers, and pricing information
en.p1_d2: Investigated current system design documents and related materials and organized information
en.p1_d3: Analyzed business and data structures when specification information was insufficient
en.p1_d4: Discussed design policies for replacement and provided technical support
en.p2_title: Trusco Orange Book BtoB EC System Development
en.p2_overview: Backend system development for BtoB EC services.
en.p2_d2: Shopping cart feature design and implementation
en.p3_overview: System development for Bus/Rent Car/Car Share services.
en.p3_d1: Design and implementation corresponding to feature additions and specification changes
en.p3_d2: Production failure investigation, correction, and release response
en.p3_d4: Consistent response from unit testing to integration, performance, and external linkage testing
en.p3_d5: Large-scale improvements and migrations including Java 1.7 to 1.8, Oracle 9i to 10g, Struts to Spring MVC, and CentOS to Rocky Linux
en.p4_overview: Cooperative system development with a major Chinese e-commerce enterprise.
en.p4_d1: Order data synchronization feature for the Japanese market
en.p4_d2: Automatic PDF transmission feature for order details
en.p4_d3: Requirements definition to design, development, and maintenance
en.p5_title: Rakuten Taiwan Market System Maintenance and Development
en.p5_overview: System maintenance and development for Rakuten services in the Taiwanese market.
en.p5_d2: End-user order, payment, and history management
en.p6_title: Sumitomo Real Estate Management System Development
en.p6_overview: Development of a real estate management system for Sumitomo.
en.p6_d1: Design and implementation of contract information, building, and facility information management functions
en.p6_d2: Screen and report design and deliverable reviews
en.p7_overview: Development of an attendance management system for universities.
en.p7_d4: Validation and deployment for specific devices
en.p8_title: Office Management System Development for Small and Medium Enterprises
en.p8_overview: Development of an office management system for small and medium enterprises.
en.p8_d1: Attendance management, paid leave application, training reservation function development
en.p9_title: Large Securities Company Business System Maintenance
en.p9_overview: Business system maintenance for a large securities company.
en.p9_d1: Production release support and data modification
en.p10_title: Core System Development and Maintenance for Major Insurance and Distribution Industries
en.p10_overview: Development and maintenance of core systems for major insurance and distribution industries.
en.p10_d1: Legal amendment response and new service response
en.p10_d2: Family folder and family discount function development
en.p10_d3: Batch processing and business logic implementation
en.pr1: Dual experience in development and operations, capable of designing and implementing with the premise of 'systems that don't end when completed'
en.pr2: Ability to learn new technologies and business knowledge
en.pr3: Experience collaborating with multinational teams from over 15 countries
en.pr4: Proven track record of stable operations and improvements in large-scale, long-term systems
en.skill_lang: Java (10+ years), JavaScript, Python, PHP, C#, COBOL, VBA, HTML, CSS, JSP, PL/SQL, Shell
en.skill_os: MacOS, Linux (CentOS, Rocky Linux), Windows, MSP-OSIV
en.skill_db: Oracle, MySQL, MongoDB, SQL Server, NDB, Sybase
en.skill_fw: Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Batch, Spring Cloud, Struts, Raku Framework
en.skill_cloud: AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB), Oracle Cloud, Alibaba Cloud
en.skill_tools: Jenkins, Zabbix, Jennifer, JIRA, Git, GitHub, Maven, Gradle
